backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that records and retrieves per-player best scores (fewest moves) for the Memory Match game, using a Map keyed by Principal. Also includes the MixinStorage blob storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping each product feature (home screen, learning section, memory match, drawing canvas, visual theme) to the relevant source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and contents of each module.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the KidZone app that loads Fredoka One and Nunito fonts from Google Fonts and mounts the React app into the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component that configures TanStack Router with four routes (Home, Learning, MemoryMatch, Draw) all wrapped in the shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/ColorPalette.tsx: UI component rendering a row of color swatch buttons and four brush-size selector buttons for the drawing canvas, with active-state highlighting and large tap targets.
frontend/src/components/DecorativeAccent: Provides reusable decorative React components: an SVG Star, a SectionHeader with animated stars and a confetti banner image, and a FloatingStars background overlay.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shared page layout with a sticky header (mascot logo + desktop nav), a mobile bottom navigation bar, main content slot, and a footer with attribution link.
frontend/src/components/LearningCard.tsx: Tappable button card for displaying a single letter or number with a bright color, bubbly rounded shape, and hover/press scale animations.
frontend/src/components/LearningPopup.ts: A modal popup component that displays a large letter or number with a fun educational fact, decorative animated stars, and a close button triggered by click or Escape key.
frontend/src/components/MemoryCard.tsx: A flip-card component for a memory matching game that shows a star on the back and an animal emoji on the front, with visual indicators for matched state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDrawingCanvas.ts: A React hook that manages a drawing canvas with mouse and touch support, providing color selection, brush size control, and a clear function.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useMemoryGame.ts: A React hook that manages all state and logic for a memory card matching game, including card flipping, match detection, move counting, and game reset.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching the user's best memory game score and recording a new score via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines a kid-friendly OKLCH color palette with CSS variables (light/dark), and declares custom animations like bounce, float, wiggle, confetti, and card-flip utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Draw.tsx: Drawing page that renders a resizable HTML canvas with a color palette toolbar and brush size controls, allowing freehand drawing with a clear button to reset the canvas.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page displaying a hero section with a mascot and KidZone branding, plus a grid of activity cards linking to Letters & Numbers, Memory Match, and Draw & Color pages.
frontend/src/pages/Learning.tsx: Learning page with tabbed navigation between alphabet letters (A–Z) and numbers (1–20), rendering colored cards that open a popup with details when tapped.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryMatch.tsx: Memory Match game page that displays a 4-column card grid, tracks moves and matched pairs, records the winning score to the backend, and shows a win overlay modal on completion.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with kid-friendly OKLCH color tokens, custom font families (Fredoka One, Nunito), extended border radii, box shadows, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the KidZone kids app project state including existing features (home screen, letter/number learning, memory match, drawing canvas, visual theme), a pending backend score-persistence feature, and image asset requirements.
